The '''Snow Hawks''' were an elite [[Cold assault stormtrooper|Snowtrooper]] unit in the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]]. They were renowned for their effectiveness during the winter campaign on [[Selsor]]'s primary continent.<ref name="SpecForce" />
